revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Essay here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}|{{essay-like|{{{1|article}}}|{{{2|}}}|date={{{date|}}}}}| {{Project other|{{short description|Essay on editing Wikipedia|noreplace}}}}{{ombox |type = notice |image = [[File:Essay.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] |text =
'''This is an [[Wikipedia:Essays|essay]]{{#if:{{{interprets|}}}| on {{#ifexist:{{{interprets}}}|[[{{{interprets}}}]]|{{{interprets|}}} }} }}.'''
It contains the advice or opinions of one or more Wikipedia contributors. This page is not an encyclopedia article, nor is it one of [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Wikipedia's policies or guidelines]], as it has not been [[Wikipedia:Consensus#Levels of consensus|thoroughly vetted by the community]]. Some essays represent widespread norms; others only represent minority viewpoints.
| imageright = {{#if:{{{shortcut|{{{shortcut1|{{{sc1|{{{sc|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} |{{Ombox/shortcut|{{{shortcut|{{{shortcut1|{{{sc1|{{{sc|{{{1|SHO:RTCUT}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{shortcut2|{{{sc2|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}|{{{shortcut3|{{{sc3|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}|{{{shortcut4|{{{sc4|{{{4|}}}}}}}}}|{{{shortcut5|{{{sc5|{{{5|}}}}}}}}}|category=no}} }} }}{{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||{{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} |{{ns:4}} = {{#ifexist:Category:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}||{{#ifexist:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|[[{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}]]|{{{category|{{{cat|}}}}}} }} }} |{{ns:2}} = {{#ifexist:Category:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}||{{#ifexist:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|[[{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]]|{{{category|{{{cat|}}}}}} }} }} }}}}}} }} {{documentation}} [[Category:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia essays|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:User essays|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:0}}|{{essay-like|{{{1|article}}}|{{{2|}}}|date={{{date|}}}}}| {{Project other|{{short description|Essay on editing Wikipedia|noreplace}}}}{{ombox |type = notice |image = [[File:Essay.svg|30px|link=|alt=]] |text =
'''This is an [[Wikipedia:Essays|essay]]{{#if:{{{interprets|}}}| on {{#ifexist:{{{interprets}}}|[[{{{interprets}}}]]|{{{interprets|}}} }} }}.'''
It contains the advice or opinions of one or more Wikipedia contributors. This page is not an encyclopedia article, nor is it one of [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Wikipedia's policies or guidelines]], as it has not been [[Wikipedia:Consensus#Levels of consensus|thoroughly vetted by the community]]. Some essays represent widespread norms; others only represent minority viewpoints.
| imageright = {{#if:{{{shortcut|{{{shortcut1|{{{sc1|{{{sc|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} |{{Ombox/shortcut|{{{shortcut|{{{shortcut1|{{{sc1|{{{sc|{{{1|SHO:RTCUT}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|{{{shortcut2|{{{sc2|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}|{{{shortcut3|{{{sc3|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}|{{{shortcut4|{{{sc4|{{{4|}}}}}}}}}|{{{shortcut5|{{{sc5|{{{5|}}}}}}}}}|category=no}} }} }}{{#ifeq:{{{demo}}}|yes||{{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} |{{ns:4}} = {{#ifexist:Category:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}||{{#ifexist:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|[[{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}]]|{{{category|{{{cat|}}}}}} }} }} |{{ns:2}} = {{#ifexist:Category:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}||{{#ifexist:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|[[{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]]|{{{category|{{{cat|}}}}}} }} }} }}}}}} }} {{documentation}} [[Category:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Wikipedia essays|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:{{{category|{{{cat}}}}}}|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:User essays|{{SUBPAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
